description: WebSocket failure patterns database for NLD neural training

symptoms: Frontend reports disconnection immediately after API call
websocket-premature-cleanup.root_cause: WebSocket cleanup logic is incorrectly tied to API subprocess lifecycle
websocket-premature-cleanup.failure_mechanism: Process close handler triggers WebSocket connection cleanup
websocket-premature-cleanup.fix_strategy: Decouple WebSocket lifecycle from API subprocess lifecycle
prevention_rules: Only close WebSocket on explicit client disconnect
Separate process cleanup from connection cleanup
Implement connection health checks independent of API status
test_scenarios: API call completes successfully - WebSocket should remain open
Multiple sequential API calls - connection should persist
Long-running API operations - connection stability maintained

frontend-polling-storm.root_cause: Missing exponential backoff in reconnection logic
frontend-polling-storm.failure_mechanism: Immediate retry without delay causes request storm
frontend-polling-storm.fix_strategy: Implement exponential backoff with jitter for reconnection attempts
test_scenarios: Simulate connection loss - verify graceful backoff
Multiple connection failures - test rate limiting
Server restart scenarios - prevent storm on reconnect

symptoms: Subsequent API calls fail to maintain connection
api-completion-kills-websocket.root_cause: Incorrect cleanup logic in API close handler
api-completion-kills-websocket.failure_mechanism: Process close event incorrectly triggers WebSocket cleanup
api-completion-kills-websocket.fix_strategy: Remove WebSocket cleanup from API process close handlers
prevention_rules: Only cleanup connections on explicit client disconnect
Separate process lifecycle from connection lifecycle
test_scenarios: API process completes - WebSocket should remain active
Multiple API processes - individual completion doesn't affect others

cascade_failures.description: API completion killing WebSocket triggers polling storm

common_root_causes: Lifecycle coupling between API and WebSocket
